name: SM Friendly Reminder
subject: Friendly Reminder: Invoice {{ doc.name }} is past due
response_html:
Dear {{ doc.customer_name }},

This is a friendly reminder that invoice {{ doc.name }} with an outstanding amount of {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.outstanding_amount, currency=doc.currency) }} was due on {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.due_date) }}.

If payment has already been sent, please disregard this notice. Otherwise, we kindly request that you arrange payment at your earliest convenience.

If you have any questions or need to discuss payment arrangements, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Spark Mojo Billing Team

name: SM Second Notice
subject: Second Notice: Invoice {{ doc.name }} requires attention
response_html:
Dear {{ doc.customer_name }},

This is a second notice regarding invoice {{ doc.name }} with an outstanding amount of {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.outstanding_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}, which was due on {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.due_date) }}.

Despite our previous reminder, this invoice remains unpaid. We urge you to arrange payment immediately to avoid further escalation.

If there are circumstances preventing timely payment, please contact us as soon as possible so we can discuss a resolution.

Thank you for your immediate attention.

Regards,
Spark Mojo Billing Team
